programme.desc: Marge on the Lam: Marge and her new friend Ruth Powers set off on a Thelma and Louise-style adventure, with Chief Wiggum and Homer in hot pursuit...

programme.desc: Bart's Inner Child: Self-help guru Brad Goodman encourages the population of Springfield to act more like Bart, with disastrous consequences. Guest starring James Brown.

programme.title: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: (1993) Comedy sequel starring Whoopi Goldberg and Lauryn Hill. Deloris - who's now made it big in Vegas - goes back undercover as a teacher to help a struggling school choir find its voice.

programme.title: New: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - The Last Man Expanding: Springfield's hooked on a weight loss drug. Homer's not sold on it, until Marge begs him to take it. But there's a side effect...

programme.title: New: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - P.S. I Hate You: Marge's reputation as Springfield's nicest resident is jeopardised when her secret stash of vitriolic letters is stolen during a house party.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: (2004) Comedy sequel. What happens when an ex-CIA prude and ageing, sexually liberated hippies become in-laws? Robert De Niro, Barbara Streisand and Dustin Hoffman show you what happens.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Emmy-Lou from Brighton appears on the daring dating show for the third time, and forensics student Charlie strips as he seeks his ideal partner in crime.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This special episode features the best moments from 2021's Gogglebox, as some of the nation's sharpest and best-loved TV critics hit the sofa for the best telly on the box.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest TV critics have been watching: The Great British Bake Off, Vigil, Sex Actually with Alice Levine and This Morning.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Emmy-Lou from Brighton appears on the daring dating show for the third time, and forensics student Charlie strips as he seeks his ideal partner in crime.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Bride Kidnap: Is Kain shooting himself in the foot planning a gangster-themed wedding? His bride-to-be Charlie has always dreamed of a wedding day fit for a princess.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Emotions flare at the McQueen family therapy session. Rex tries to make amends. John Paul calls in a favour from Smithy. Dillon has a proposal for Donny. And Prince is backed into a corner.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: John Paul calls in a favour from his new friend Smithy, but can he be trusted? Dillon has a proposal for Donny, and a revelation leaves a relationship on shaky ground.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Prince is backed into a corner. Liberty leans on her friends as concerns about her new relationship rise. And a resident is overwhelmed with emotion.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Olde Hitching Post: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Levanti's: Gordon visits Pennsylvania, where he meets siblings whose inability to work together is risking their father's life savings at his Italian restaurant, Levanti's.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Han Ukkah Solo: When Beverly talks Erica into writing a Hanukkah song for the school holiday concert, she inspires Barry to prove his own musical prowess.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: O Captain! My Captain!: Beverly hopes to inspire the students when she takes over as substitute teacher in Barry's chemistry class. Adam embarrasses Emmy.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Catch of the Day: Phil is convinced he's going to have a bad luck day after failing to complete his daily superstition. Mitch is certain that Cam is undermining him.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Sex, Lies, and Kickball: Jay's best friend, Shorty, returns from Costa Rica and stays at the house so that they can reconnect. And Alex is ready to shed her good-girl image.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room: In California, Gordon visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room, where he tries to mend relationships between the owner, his wife and their children.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Nino's: Gordon visits Long Beach in California to save Nino's, a failing Italian restaurant that opened in 1958 and is now under the misguided leadership of eldest son Nino.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Sabotage: Peralta thinks someone's trying to sabotage his professional life, but Santiago and Diaz aren't convinced. Boyle, Hitchcock and Scully work on a tricky case.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: AC/DC: Peralta injures himself chasing a suspect but won't take time off to recover. Holt and Diaz have an awkward dinner date with their significant others.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: My Big Fat Geek Wedding: On the eve of their nuptials, Edna calls it all off with Principal Skinner. As Marge consoles Edna, she realises her own relationship isn't so great.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Catch 'Em if You Can: Homer and Marge abscond for a romantic weekend in Miami, so Bart and Lisa chase them across the country to ruin their holiday.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Fonzie Scheme: Murray is honoured for his business skills. Barry's scheme to steal golf carts goes off the rails. Beverly attempts to help Murray find a hobby.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Day After the Day After: After watching a scary TV film, Barry begs Murray to build an underground bunker.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Written in the Stars: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset with Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Wine Weekend: The family go on a wine-tasting trip, and Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house - but they can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Into the Woods: Peralta and Boyle persuade Jeffords to join them on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods, but it isn't the fun excursion they'd hoped for.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Mattress: Peralta and Santiago convince Captain Holt to let them work together on a case involving a new street drug, but their romance gets in the way.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A Milhouse Divided: When Milhouse's parents split up, his mum gets together with an American Gladiator called Pyro, his dad self-produces an album and Milhouse goes a bit crazy.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa's Date with Density: Lisa has a crush on Nelson. But can she get him to change his ways?

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Froggy shares memories with Rex as they scatter Grace's ashes. Ro makes a decision about his future, but not everyone approves. And chemistry grows between two residents.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Every Man's Dream: Homer and Marge have a trial separation and embark on new relationships when Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can two content creators, an adventure mermaid and a Sicilian chef find love? And Shrish returns, for cat chat, banter, bonding and plenty of spicy margaritas with James.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's top TV critics on: Vigil, Ready to Mingle, Beat the Chasers, Help, Antiques Roadshow, Life Drawing Live!, Take a Hike, and ITV News on the US Open.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

programme.title: Benedetta
programme.desc: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.

programme.title: In Fear
programme.desc: (2013) Psychological horror with Iain De Caestecker and Alice Englert. A couple get lost in remote rural lanes as they drive to a music festival. Frustration turns to fear as dusk falls...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Lifeboat
programme.desc: (1944) Alfred Hitchcock's Oscar-nominated Second World War drama starring Tallulah Bankhead, William Bendix and Walter Slezak as three of the survivors from a liner torpedoed by the Nazis.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: (2006) Spooky animated caper with Maggie Gyllenhaal and Steve Buscemi. A young boy and his babysitter spy on the creepy neighbour. Did he really eat his wife?

programme.title: Stormbreaker
programme.desc: (2006) Family action-thriller with Alex Pettyfer and Mickey Rourke. British intelligence recruit a schoolboy to take on the man who killed his dad and is planning to unleash a deadly virus.

programme.title: The Personal History of David...
programme.desc: ...Copperfield: (2019) Armando Iannucci's critically acclaimed comedy-drama reinvention of the classic Charles Dickens novel, starring Dev Patel, Tilda Swinton and Hugh Laurie.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: (1978) Brian De Palma's supernatural horror with Kirk Douglas, John Cassavetes, Andrew Stevens and Amy Irving. A shadowy agency abducts a young man with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: (2019) Oscar-nominated psychological horror starring Willem Dafoe and Robert Pattinson. A pair of lighthouse keepers dangerously descend into insanity on a remote island.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Arabesque
programme.desc: (1966) Gregory Peck stars in Stanley Donen's spy thiller. An Oxford professor is unwittingly drawn into a deadly web of political intrigue. With Sophia Loren and Alan Badel.

programme.title: Think Like a Dog
programme.desc: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: (2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: (2019) Horror based on Stephen King's novel. A family move to the countryside for the quiet life. But there's a road with speeding trucks and a pet cemetery that resurrects the dead...

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills

programme.desc: Aged to Perfection: Ainsley Harriott tours a rum distillery and an island rum cake factory, a trip which offers inspiration for a Bahama Mama tiramisu.

programme.desc: Mark Pougatch is joined by Jonny Wilkinson, Dan Biggar and Jamie Roberts for coverage as England and Wales open their 2026 Six Nations campaigns at the Allianz Stadium, Twickenham.

programme.title: New: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett is joined by panellists Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall, Maya Jama, Mo Gilligan and special guest Katherine Ryan for the seventh series semi-final of the guessing game.
